bonuses.stat:
Your Light Attacks deal 1220 Flame damage over 6 seconds.

Your fully-charged Heavy Attacks consume up to 3 of your damage over time effects to deal 862 Flame damage in a 6 meter radius on the target, dealing up to 200% more damage to enemies below 33% Health.

The damage scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage and is increased by 20% for each damage over time effect on the target, up to 60%.
